content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-028)

## Closest-to-completion (prioritise)

1. **`dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso` (B1) — TensorObjInverse L224, sorry L238.** The whole cocycle-A
   collapse mechanism is proven mod this single naturality square (N):
   `dualIsoOfIso s ≪≫ dual_unit_iso = dual_unit_iso ≪≫ s`. Decompose into (★') presheaf eval-core +
   counit naturality. (★') sectionwise = `evalLin (pushforward₀.map ŝ.hom ≫ φ) 1 = ŝ.app·(evalLin φ 1)`.
   Slice eval API ready: `evalLin` (PresheafInternalHom.lean L889), `dualPrecompEquiv` (L1033),
   `unitDualSectionEquiv` (SliceTransport.lean L42). ~100–150 LOC pure project-API assembly, NOT a
   Mathlib gap. **Closing B1 immediately closes `tensorObj_unit_self_duality_collapse`** (its body is
   already sorry-free). This is the cheapest structural win available.

2. **`pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` — TensorObjSubstrate L4273, sorry L4331.** Mate already unfolded
   to concrete unit/δ/counit form. **DO NOT re-attempt the mate/IsMonoidal route — confirmed CIRCULAR**
   (post-unfold residual = K1's `hmon` which consumes this lemma). The non-circular route computes BOTH
   sides sectionwise to `m⊗ₜn` independently. Concrete next move: reduce the RHS μ at MORPHISM level
   (`rw [pushforward_μ_eq]` on the bare RHS μ) BEFORE `hom_ext` — `pushforward_μ_eq` does not key-match
   once under `.app W .hom`. Then `hom_ext` + `tensor_ext` + `comp_app` (all verified to fire) and the
   LHS sectionwise mate legs (`pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply`, `pushforward_map_app_apply`,
   `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp_δ`, the `pushforward₀`/`restrictScalars` δ values, `hadj'`-counit + tensorHom).
   If it stalls at the section-extensionality step, finer effort-break: LHS `δ Gβ` half / RHS `μ(pushforward)` half.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign as-is
- **`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` (L4340/4436)** — downstream of `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison`;
  rewiring before it closes gives no sorry benefit and risks the compile. Re-assign only AFTER #2 closes.
- **`exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L397)** — gated on `trivialisation_restrict_compat` + B1. Don't dispatch
  the cocycle assembly until both ingredients land.
- **`pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` mate/IsMonoidal route** — circular, empirically confirmed 2nd time.
  Never re-attempt; sectionwise only.

## Secondary
- **`trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L211)** — compile-fixed only; eqToHom restriction-naturality chase
  mirroring `restrictIsoUnitOfLE` (cocycle-a.md §A idiom). Needed to unblock `exists_tensorObj_inverse`.

## Coverage debt (1-to-1) — planner must blueprint these `lean_aux` decls (dag-query unmatched, +4 this iter)
- `restrictScalars_oplaxMonoidal_η_app_one` (TensorObjSubstrate ~L4111) — oplax η sends section `1↦1`.
  Uses: `ModuleCat.restrictScalars_η`, `RingHom.map_one`, `Functor.Monoidal.ε_η`,
  `restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective`. (lvb-substrate028 major M1 — sibling helper is documented; parity.)
- `tensorHom_inv_comp_leftUnitor` (TensorObjInverse ~L129) — general monoidal coherence (no Scheme
  content). Uses: `MonoidalCategory.{tensorHom_def,leftUnitor_naturality,rightUnitor_naturality,unitors_equal}`.
- `tensorObjIsoOfIso_comp_unit_iso` (TensorObjInverse ~L143, B2) — Uses: `tensorHom_inv_comp_leftUnitor`,
  `tensorObjIsoOfIso`, `tensorObj_unit_iso`, sheafification functoriality.
- `dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso` (TensorObjInverse ~L224, B1) — Uses: `dual_unit_iso`, `dualIsoOfIso`,
  `presheafDualUnitIso`/`dualUnitIsoGen` eval-core; reduced to naturality (N).
(Full unmatched count = 108; the 104-node backlog from prior iters persists — see prior recommendations.)

## Cleanup lane (MEDIUM, from lean-auditor iter028 majors — needs a prover/refactor, not review)
- TensorObjSubstrate.lean header L46–47: stale — claims "SOLE sorry is `hmon` ~L4223"; actual sorries are
  L4331 (`pushforward_lax_mu_comparison`) + L4436 (`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`), ~230 off.
- TensorObjSubstrate.lean L162: stale — "pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial (sorry, seed-1 active)" but it
  is fully sorry-free at L4740.
- TensorObjInverse.lean L161: `CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val` deprecation (→ `ObjectProperty.obj`).

## Reusable patterns discovered (→ Knowledge Base)
- **Oplax-unit-on-`1` plumbing:** state the unit element through the genuine ring `(S⋙forget₂…).obj W`
  (not `𝟙_ .obj W`) so `OfNat`/`One` synthesises; close the composite with `erw [helper, map_one]; rfl`.
  NEVER pre-apply `Functor.map_id` (dependent motive failure).
- **Carrier-diamond collapse** (`X.ringCatSheaf.val` vs `X.presheaf⋙forget₂`): `erw [Functor.map_comp]`
  + `exact congrArg (· ≫ _) hmap`; plain `rw` fails on the middle-object diamond.
- **Contravariant-symm sidestep:** to get `(dualIsoOfIso t).symm`-shaped legs, take `congrArg Iso.symm`
  of the forward identity + `simpa`, rather than the `(dualIsoOfIso t).symm = dualIsoOfIso t.symm`
  rewrite (DEAD — pattern-not-found on `dualIsoOfIso (t ≪≫ t.symm)`).
